mapper.sql: id, project_id, applicant_user_id, status, submit_time, approver_user_id, approve_time, reject_time, reject_comment, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_archive_application ( project_id, applicant_user_id, status, submit_time, approver_user_id, approve_time, reject_time, reject_comment, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{projectId}, #{applicantUserId}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'PENDING_APPROVAL'), COALESCE(#{submitTime}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), #{approverUserId}, #{approveTime}, #{rejectTime}, #{rejectComment}, COALESCE(#{createdAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), COALESCE(#{updatedAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM project_archive_application WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND status = 'PENDING_APPROVAL' LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM project_archive_application WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND status = 'REJECTED' ORDER BY COALESCE(reject_time, updated_at) DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE project_archive_application SET status = #{status}, approver_user_id = #{approverUserId}, approve_time = #{approveTime}, reject_time = #{rejectTime}, reject_comment = #{rejectComment}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT app.id AS application_id, app.status, COALESCE(TRIM(applicant.real_name), applicant.username) AS applicant_display_name, COALESCE(TRIM(approver.real_name), approver.username) AS approver_display_name, app.submit_time, COALESCE(app.approve_time, app.reject_time) AS operation_time, app.reject_comment, re.evidence_id AS rej_evidence_id, ei.title AS rej_evidence_name, ds.name AS rej_stage_name, re.reject_comment AS rej_reject_comment FROM project_archive_application app LEFT JOIN sys_user applicant ON app.applicant_user_id = applicant.id LEFT JOIN sys_user approver ON app.approver_user_id = approver.id LEFT JOIN archive_reject_evidence re ON re.application_id = app.id LEFT JOIN evidence_item ei ON ei.id = re.evidence_id LEFT JOIN delivery_stage ds ON ds.id = ei.stage_id WHERE app.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY app.submit_time DESC, re.id ASC NULLS LAST
